title: centaurea resupinata subsp. virens
intro: Centaurea resupinata subsp. virens is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea resupinata subsp. virens include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat colds, fever, and skin irritations.
